pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Applied Analytics & BI is an edge domain for the Data and AI Transformation Lead, this knowledge KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.396) and conceptual alignment to include at the senior specialist level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.396). External validation of this knowledge KSA for the Data and AI Transformation Lead role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Applied Analytics & BI for the Data and AI Transformation Lead is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI knowledge KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.396. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Data and AI Transformation Lead.
